authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(140) — Solano Lake
sources.quotedText: Solano Lake (Solano Co.). All year. Only artificial lures and barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: Boating on Lake Solano | Solano County, California
sources.quotedText: No motorized (gas or electric-powered) boats are allowed on the lake.

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: Wikipedia — Lake Solano, Solano/Yolo County, California (infobox coordinates; used because the USGS GNIS ArcGIS gazetteer (nationalmap.gov geonames MapServer/7, layers 6 and 7) has no queryable record for this reservoir under "Lake Solano", "Solano Lake", or "Solano" anywhere in California — confirmed via both an exact-name query and a nationwide substring search)
sources.quotedText: {{coord|38.49|-122.03|region:US-CA_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} = 38.49, -122.03, matching the file's recorded coordinate (-122.0291, 38.4917) to within ~150m. Independently corroborated by the CA Dept. of Boating and Waterways facility coordinate for the Lake Solano Park boat launch (38.493086, -122.028297), ~170m from the file's point.

groups.humanSummary: Solano Lake: year-round, catch-and-release trout only, artificial lures with barbless hooks.
groups.verbatimText: Solano Lake (Solano Co.). All year. Only artificial lures and barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year, catch-and-release for trout

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used; applies to the trout fishery.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used (trout)
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures and barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: No trout may be kept from Solano Lake; all trout caught must be released. Statewide default limits apply to non-trout species (bass, catfish, panfish), which are not restricted by this listing.

parameters.note: Only canoes, kayaks, and other nonmotorized boats may be launched on the lake.

regulations.citation: Solano County Parks — Boating on Lake Solano
regulations.humanSummary: No motorized boats (gas or electric); nonmotorized boats only
regulations.verbatimText: No motorized (gas or electric-powered) boats are allowed on the lake.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
